name: Robex Resources Inc.
description: Robex Resources Inc. is a Canadian-based gold production and development company focused on mining operations and exploration activities across West Africa. The company operates the Nampala gold mine in Mali and is actively developing the Kiniero Gold Project in Guinea. Listed on the TSX Venture Exchange, Robex is committed to sustainable mining practices and creating long-term value for its shareholders by leveraging its portfolio of high-quality assets in the prolific Birimian Greenstone belt, while maintaining a strong focus on operational excellence and growth within the region.
